message.content:
I'm exploring the vllm-neuron project at /dev3/zigeng/neuron to understand how chunked prefill could be added. This is very thorough exploration.

1. First, find the directory structure - look for neuron-specific code. Check directories like `vllm/worker/`, `vllm/engine/`, `vllm/core/` for any neuron-specific files.

2. Find the neuron model runner - look for files like `neuron_model_runner.py` or similar. Read the full file to understand:
   - How prefill and decode are currently handled
   - What execute_model does
   - How input preparation works
   - What batching strategy is used

3. Find the neuron worker file and understand:
   - How it initializes models
   - How it handles scheduling decisions
   - The interface between scheduler and worker

4. Look at any neuron-specific scheduler or config that controls prefill behavior.

5. Check if there's a `neuron_executor.py` or similar execution layer.

Report the full file paths, key classes, and methods relevant to prefill handling.

attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- dataviz: Use this skill whenever you are about to create ANY chart, graph, plot, dashboard, or data visualization, in ANY output medium — an HTML or React artifact, inline SVG, plotting code in any library (matplotlib, plotly, d3, Recharts, …), an image/PNG you will render and upload, or a chart shared into Slack. Read it BEFORE writing the first line of chart code, choosing chart colors, building a stat tile / meter / KPI row, or laying out a dashboard. Produces visualizations that read as one system — elegant, accessible, consistent in light and dark — using a brand-neutral placeholder palette you swap for your own. Teaches a design-system-agnostic method: a form heuristic, a color formula with a runnable validator, mark specs, and interaction rules. A validated default palette is documented in `references/palette.md` — swap that file's values for your brand's. Triggers on: "chart", "graph", "plot", "data viz", "visualization", "dashboard", "analytics", "visualize data", "categorical colors", "sequential / diverging palette", "stat tile", "sparkline", "heatmap", "legend", "axis", "tooltip", "chart colors", "color by series".
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a GitHub pull request; for your working diff use /code-review
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

content.content:
1	# vLLM on AWS Neuron - 快速开始
2	
3	已成功在 Neuron 服务器上配置 vLLM 环境！
4	
5	## 📦 已安装内容
6	
7	### Docker 镜像
8	- **镜像名称**: `huggingface-vllm-inference-neuronx`
9	- **版本**: 0.11.0-optimum0.4.5-neuronx-py310-sdk2.26.1-ubuntu22.04
10	- **大小**: 12.2 GB（压缩后 2.88 GB）
11	- **来源**: AWS 官方 Deep Learning Container (DLC)
12	
13	### 系统配置
14	- **实例**: trn2.3xlarge
15	- **Neuron 设备**: 1 个设备，4 核心，96 GB 内存
16	- **操作系统**: Ubuntu 24.04 LTS
17	- **Docker**: v29.6.1
18	
19	## 🚀 快速开始
20	
21	### 1. 启动 vLLM 服务器
22	
23	使用默认配置（Llama-3-8B 模型）：
24	
25	```bash
26	./run-vllm-server.sh
27	```
28	
29	使用自定义模型：
30	
31	```bash
32	./run-vllm-server.sh "meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-hf" 4
33	```
34	
35	### 2. 测试服务器
36	
37	在另一个终端运行：
38	
39	```bash
40	./test-vllm.sh
41	```
42	
43	或手动测试：
44	
45	```bash
46	# 列出模型
47	curl http://localhost:8000/v1/models
48	
49	# 文本补全
50	curl http://localhost:8000/v1/completions \
51	  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
52	  -d '{
53	    "model": "NousResearch/Meta-Llama-3-8B",
54	    "prompt": "Once upon a time",
55	    "max_tokens": 50
56	  }'
57	```
58	
59	## 📁 文件说明
60	
61	| 文件 | 说明 |
62	|------|------|
63	| `setup-vllm.sh` | 拉取官方 vLLM Neuron Docker 镜像 |
64	| `run-vllm-server.sh` | 启动 vLLM 服务器 |
65	| `test-vllm.sh` | 测试 vLLM 服务器功能 |
66	| `VLLM_SETUP.md` | 详细配置和使用文档 |
67	| `Dockerfile.vllm` | 自定义 Dockerfile（可选） |
68	
69	## 🔧 常用命令
70	
71	### 监控 Neuron 设备
72	```bash
73	neuron-ls          # 列出 Neuron 设备
74	neuron-top         # 实时监控
75	```
76	
77	### Docker 管理
78	```bash
79	docker ps          # 查看运行中的容器
80	docker logs <id>   # 查看容器日志
81	docker stop <id>   # 停止容器
82	```
83	
84	### 使用本地虚拟环境（无 Docker）
85	```bash
86	source /opt/aws_neuronx_venv_pytorch_inference_vllm_0_16/bin/activate
87	python -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server --help
88	```
89	
90	## 📚 支持的模型
91	
92	vLLM on Neuron 支持以下模型系列：
93	
94	- ✅ Llama 2/3 (7B, 13B, 70B)
95	- ✅ Mistral (7B)
96	- ✅ Mixtral (8x7B)
97	- ✅ GPT-NeoX
98	- ✅ OPT
99	- ✅ Bloom
100	
101	## 🔗 参考链接
102	
103	- [VLLM_SETUP.md](VLLM_SETUP.md) - 详细文档
104	- [AWS Neuron vLLM 文档](https://awsdocs-neuron.readthedocs-hosted.com/en/latest/libraries/nxd-inference/vllm/)
105	- [AWS DLC 镜像列表](https://aws.github.io/deep-learning-containers/)
106	
107	## ⚠️ 注意事项
108	
109	1. **首次运行会下载模型**，可能需要几分钟到几十分钟（取决于模型大小）
110	2. 模型会缓存在 `~/.cache/huggingface/`
111	3. **推荐的 tensor-parallel-size**: 4（对应 4 个 Neuron 核心）
112	4. **推荐的共享内存**: 16GB 或更大
113	
114	## 🐛 故障排除
115	
116	### 镜像拉取失败
117	```bash
118	# 重新登录 ECR
119	aws ecr get-login-password --region us-west-2 | \
120	  docker login --username AWS --password-stdin \
121	  763104351884.dkr.ecr.us-west-2.amazonaws.com
122	
123	# 重新运行 setup
124	./setup-vllm.sh
125	```
126	
127	### Neuron 设备访问问题
128	```bash
129	# 检查设备权限
130	ls -la /dev/neuron*
131	
132	# 验证 Neuron 运行时
133	neuron-ls
134	```
135	
136	### 内存不足
137	- 尝试更小的模型（如 7B 而非 70B）
138	- 减少 `--tensor-parallel-size`
139	- 增加 Docker 的 `--shm-size`
140	
141	---
142	
143	**环境已就绪！运行 `./run-vllm-server.sh` 开始使用 vLLM。**
144

file.content:
# vLLM on AWS Neuron - 快速开始

已成功在 Neuron 服务器上配置 vLLM 环境！

## 📦 已安装内容

### Docker 镜像
- **镜像名称**: `huggingface-vllm-inference-neuronx`
- **版本**: 0.11.0-optimum0.4.5-neuronx-py310-sdk2.26.1-ubuntu22.04
- **大小**: 12.2 GB（压缩后 2.88 GB）
- **来源**: AWS 官方 Deep Learning Container (DLC)

### 系统配置
- **实例**: trn2.3xlarge
- **Neuron 设备**: 1 个设备，4 核心，96 GB 内存
- **操作系统**: Ubuntu 24.04 LTS
- **Docker**: v29.6.1

## 🚀 快速开始

### 1. 启动 vLLM 服务器

使用默认配置（Llama-3-8B 模型）：

```bash
./run-vllm-server.sh
```

使用自定义模型：

```bash
./run-vllm-server.sh "meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-hf" 4
```

### 2. 测试服务器

在另一个终端运行：

```bash
./test-vllm.sh
```

或手动测试：

```bash
# 列出模型
curl http://localhost:8000/v1/models

# 文本补全
curl http://localhost:8000/v1/completions \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "model": "NousResearch/Meta-Llama-3-8B",
    "prompt": "Once upon a time",
    "max_tokens": 50
  }'
```

## 📁 文件说明

| 文件 | 说明 |
|------|------|
| `setup-vllm.sh` | 拉取官方 vLLM Neuron Docker 镜像 |
| `run-vllm-server.sh` | 启动 vLLM 服务器 |
| `test-vllm.sh` | 测试 vLLM 服务器功能 |
| `VLLM_SETUP.md` | 详细配置和使用文档 |
| `Dockerfile.vllm` | 自定义 Dockerfile（可选） |

## 🔧 常用命令

### 监控 Neuron 设备
```bash
neuron-ls          # 列出 Neuron 设备
neuron-top         # 实时监控
```

### Docker 管理
```bash
docker ps          # 查看运行中的容器
docker logs <id>   # 查看容器日志
docker stop <id>   # 停止容器
```

### 使用本地虚拟环境（无 Docker）
```bash
source /opt/aws_neuronx_venv_pytorch_inference_vllm_0_16/bin/activate
python -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server --help
```

## 📚 支持的模型

vLLM on Neuron 支持以下模型系列：

- ✅ Llama 2/3 (7B, 13B, 70B)
- ✅ Mistral (7B)
- ✅ Mixtral (8x7B)
- ✅ GPT-NeoX
- ✅ OPT
- ✅ Bloom

## 🔗 参考链接

- [VLLM_SETUP.md](VLLM_SETUP.md) - 详细文档
- [AWS Neuron vLLM 文档](https://awsdocs-neuron.readthedocs-hosted.com/en/latest/libraries/nxd-inference/vllm/)
- [AWS DLC 镜像列表](https://aws.github.io/deep-learning-containers/)

## ⚠️ 注意事项

1. **首次运行会下载模型**，可能需要几分钟到几十分钟（取决于模型大小）
2. 模型会缓存在 `~/.cache/huggingface/`
3. **推荐的 tensor-parallel-size**: 4（对应 4 个 Neuron 核心）
4. **推荐的共享内存**: 16GB 或更大

## 🐛 故障排除

### 镜像拉取失败
```bash
# 重新登录 ECR
aws ecr get-login-password --region us-west-2 | \
  docker login --username AWS --password-stdin \
  763104351884.dkr.ecr.us-west-2.amazonaws.com

# 重新运行 setup
./setup-vllm.sh
```

### Neuron 设备访问问题
```bash
# 检查设备权限
ls -la /dev/neuron*

# 验证 Neuron 运行时
neuron-ls
```

### 内存不足
- 尝试更小的模型（如 7B 而非 70B）
- 减少 `--tensor-parallel-size`
- 增加 Docker 的 `--shm-size`

---

**环境已就绪！运行 `./run-vllm-server.sh` 开始使用 vLLM。**

content.content:
1	# vLLM on AWS Neuron Setup Guide
2	
3	本指南帮助您在 AWS Neuron 服务器上使用官方 Deep Learning Container 运行 vLLM。
4	
5	## 系统信息
6	
7	- **实例类型**: trn2.3xlarge
8	- **Neuron 设备**: 1 个 Neuron 设备 (4 核心, 96 GB 内存)
9	- **操作系统**: Ubuntu 24.04 LTS
10	- **Docker**: v29.6.1
11	
12	## 使用的镜像
13	
14	我们使用 AWS 官方的 HuggingFace vLLM Inference NeuronX Deep Learning Container:
15	
16	```
17	763104351884.dkr.ecr.<region>.amazonaws.com/huggingface-vllm-inference-neuronx:0.11.0-optimum0.4.5-neuronx-py310-sdk2.26.1-ubuntu22.04
18	```
19	
20	### 镜像特性
21	
22	- **vLLM 版本**: 0.11.0
23	- **Optimum Neuron**: 0.4.5
24	- **Python**: 3.10
25	- **Neuron SDK**: 2.26.1
26	- **基础镜像**: Ubuntu 22.04
27	
28	## 快速开始
29	
30	### 1. 拉取镜像
31	
32	```bash
33	chmod +x setup-vllm.sh
34	./setup-vllm.sh
35	```
36	
37	这个脚本会：
38	- 自动登录到 AWS ECR
39	- 拉取最新的 vLLM Neuron DLC 镜像
40	
41	### 2. 运行 vLLM 服务器
42	
43	```bash
44	chmod +x run-vllm-server.sh
45	./run-vllm-server.sh
46	```
47	
48	默认使用 `NousResearch/Meta-Llama-3-8B` 模型和 tensor-parallel-size=4。
49	
50	#### 自定义模型和参数
51	
52	```bash
53	./run-vllm-server.sh "meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-hf" 4
54	```
55	
56	### 3. 测试 vLLM 服务器
57	
58	服务器启动后，在另一个终端测试：
59	
60	```bash
61	curl http://localhost:8000/v1/models
62	```
63	
64	发送推理请求：
65	
66	```bash
67	curl http://localhost:8000/v1/completions \
68	  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
69	  -d '{
70	    "model": "NousResearch/Meta-Llama-3-8B",
71	    "prompt": "San Francisco is a",
72	    "max_tokens": 50,
73	    "temperature": 0.7
74	  }'
75	```
76	
77	## 手动运行 Docker 容器
78	
79	如果您想手动运行容器：
80	
81	```bash
82	docker run --rm \
83	  --device=/dev/neuron0 \
84	  --shm-size=16gb \
85	  -p 8000:8000 \
86	  -v ~/.cache/huggingface:/root/.cache/huggingface \
87	  763104351884.dkr.ecr.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/huggingface-vllm-inference-neuronx:0.11.0-optimum0.4.5-neuronx-py310-sdk2.26.1-ubuntu22.04 \
88	  python -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \
89	  --model NousResearch/Meta-Llama-3-8B \
90	  --tensor-parallel-size 4 \
91	  --host 0.0.0.0 \
92	  --port 8000
93	```
94	
95	### 参数说明
96	
97	- `--device=/dev/neuron0`: 挂载 Neuron 设备
98	- `--shm-size=16gb`: 设置共享内存大小
99	- `-p 8000:8000`: 暴露端口 8000
100	- `-v ~/.cache/huggingface:/root/.cache/huggingface`: 缓存 HuggingFace 模型
101	- `--tensor-parallel-size 4`: 使用 4 个 Neuron 核心进行张量并行
102	
103	## 使用本地虚拟环境
104	
105	系统已经预装了 vLLM 虚拟环境：
106	
107	```bash
108	source /opt/aws_neuronx_venv_pytorch_inference_vllm_0_16/bin/activate
109	python -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server --help
110	```
111	
112	预装版本：
113	- vLLM: 0.16.0
114	- vLLM-Neuron: 0.5.3
115	- PyTorch: 2.9.1
116	- Torch-NeuronX: 2.9.0.2.15.32035
117	
118	## 其他可用镜像
119	
120	### PyTorch Inference NeuronX (不含 vLLM)
121	
122	```
123	763104351884.dkr.ecr.<region>.amazonaws.com/pytorch-inference-neuronx:2.9.0-neuronx-py312-sdk2.30.0-ubuntu24.04
124	```
125	
126	### HuggingFace PyTorch Inference NeuronX
127	
128	```
129	763104351884.dkr.ecr.<region>.amazonaws.com/huggingface-pytorch-inference-neuronx:2.9.0-transformers5.5.3-neuronx-py312-sdk2.30.0-ubuntu24.04
130	```
131	
132	## 支持的模型
133	
134	vLLM on Neuron 支持多种流行的 LLM 模型：
135	
136	- Llama 2/3 系列
137	- Mistral 系列
138	- GPT-NeoX
139	- OPT
140	- Bloom
141	
142	详细的模型支持列表请参考：
143	https://awsdocs-neuron.readthedocs-hosted.com/en/latest/libraries/nxd-inference/vllm/index.html
144	
145	## 监控 Neuron 设备
146	
147	查看 Neuron 设备状态：
148	
149	```bash
150	neuron-ls
151	neuron-top
152	```
153	
154	## 故障排除
155	
156	### 权限问题
157	
158	如果遇到 Neuron 设备访问权限问题，确保 Docker 容器有权限访问 `/dev/neuron*`：
159	
160	```bash
161	ls -la /dev/neuron*
162	```
163	
164	### 内存不足
165	
166	如果出现内存不足错误，尝试：
167	1. 增加 `--shm-size` 参数
168	2. 使用更小的模型
169	3. 减少 `--tensor-parallel-size`
170	
171	### ECR 认证
172	
173	如果拉取镜像失败，手动登录 ECR：
174	
175	```bash
176	aws ecr get-login-password --region us-west-2 | \
177	  docker login --username AWS --password-stdin \
178	  763104351884.dkr.ecr.us-west-2.amazonaws.com
179	```
180	
181	## 参考资料
182	
183	- [AWS Neuron SDK 文档](https://awsdocs-neuron.readthedocs-hosted.com/)
184	- [vLLM on Neuron 用户指南](https://awsdocs-neuron.readthedocs-hosted.com/en/latest/libraries/nxd-inference/vllm/index.html)
185	- [AWS Deep Learning Containers](https://aws.github.io/deep-learning-containers/)
186	- [vLLM 官方文档](https://docs.vllm.ai/)
187

file.content:
# vLLM on AWS Neuron Setup Guide

本指南帮助您在 AWS Neuron 服务器上使用官方 Deep Learning Container 运行 vLLM。

## 系统信息

- **实例类型**: trn2.3xlarge
- **Neuron 设备**: 1 个 Neuron 设备 (4 核心, 96 GB 内存)
- **操作系统**: Ubuntu 24.04 LTS
- **Docker**: v29.6.1

## 使用的镜像

我们使用 AWS 官方的 HuggingFace vLLM Inference NeuronX Deep Learning Container:

```
763104351884.dkr.ecr.<region>.amazonaws.com/huggingface-vllm-inference-neuronx:0.11.0-optimum0.4.5-neuronx-py310-sdk2.26.1-ubuntu22.04
```

### 镜像特性

- **vLLM 版本**: 0.11.0
- **Optimum Neuron**: 0.4.5
- **Python**: 3.10
- **Neuron SDK**: 2.26.1
- **基础镜像**: Ubuntu 22.04

## 快速开始

### 1. 拉取镜像

```bash
chmod +x setup-vllm.sh
./setup-vllm.sh
```

这个脚本会：
- 自动登录到 AWS ECR
- 拉取最新的 vLLM Neuron DLC 镜像

### 2. 运行 vLLM 服务器

```bash
chmod +x run-vllm-server.sh
./run-vllm-server.sh
```

默认使用 `NousResearch/Meta-Llama-3-8B` 模型和 tensor-parallel-size=4。

#### 自定义模型和参数

```bash
./run-vllm-server.sh "meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-hf" 4
```

### 3. 测试 vLLM 服务器

服务器启动后，在另一个终端测试：

```bash
curl http://localhost:8000/v1/models
```

发送推理请求：

```bash
curl http://localhost:8000/v1/completions \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "model": "NousResearch/Meta-Llama-3-8B",
    "prompt": "San Francisco is a",
    "max_tokens": 50,
    "temperature": 0.7
  }'
```

## 手动运行 Docker 容器

如果您想手动运行容器：

```bash
docker run --rm \
  --device=/dev/neuron0 \
  --shm-size=16gb \
  -p 8000:8000 \
  -v ~/.cache/huggingface:/root/.cache/huggingface \
  763104351884.dkr.ecr.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/huggingface-vllm-inference-neuronx:0.11.0-optimum0.4.5-neuronx-py310-sdk2.26.1-ubuntu22.04 \
  python -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \
  --model NousResearch/Meta-Llama-3-8B \
  --tensor-parallel-size 4 \
  --host 0.0.0.0 \
  --port 8000
```

### 参数说明

- `--device=/dev/neuron0`: 挂载 Neuron 设备
- `--shm-size=16gb`: 设置共享内存大小
- `-p 8000:8000`: 暴露端口 8000
- `-v ~/.cache/huggingface:/root/.cache/huggingface`: 缓存 HuggingFace 模型
- `--tensor-parallel-size 4`: 使用 4 个 Neuron 核心进行张量并行

## 使用本地虚拟环境

系统已经预装了 vLLM 虚拟环境：

```bash
source /opt/aws_neuronx_venv_pytorch_inference_vllm_0_16/bin/activate
python -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server --help
```

预装版本：
- vLLM: 0.16.0
- vLLM-Neuron: 0.5.3
- PyTorch: 2.9.1
- Torch-NeuronX: 2.9.0.2.15.32035

## 其他可用镜像

### PyTorch Inference NeuronX (不含 vLLM)

```
763104351884.dkr.ecr.<region>.amazonaws.com/pytorch-inference-neuronx:2.9.0-neuronx-py312-sdk2.30.0-ubuntu24.04
```

### HuggingFace PyTorch Inference NeuronX

```
763104351884.dkr.ecr.<region>.amazonaws.com/huggingface-pytorch-inference-neuronx:2.9.0-transformers5.5.3-neuronx-py312-sdk2.30.0-ubuntu24.04
```

## 支持的模型

vLLM on Neuron 支持多种流行的 LLM 模型：

- Llama 2/3 系列
- Mistral 系列
- GPT-NeoX
- OPT
- Bloom

详细的模型支持列表请参考：
https://awsdocs-neuron.readthedocs-hosted.com/en/latest/libraries/nxd-inference/vllm/index.html

## 监控 Neuron 设备

查看 Neuron 设备状态：

```bash
neuron-ls
neuron-top
```

## 故障排除

### 权限问题

如果遇到 Neuron 设备访问权限问题，确保 Docker 容器有权限访问 `/dev/neuron*`：

```bash
ls -la /dev/neuron*
```

### 内存不足

如果出现内存不足错误，尝试：
1. 增加 `--shm-size` 参数
2. 使用更小的模型
3. 减少 `--tensor-parallel-size`

### ECR 认证

如果拉取镜像失败，手动登录 ECR：

```bash
aws ecr get-login-password --region us-west-2 | \
  docker login --username AWS --password-stdin \
  763104351884.dkr.ecr.us-west-2.amazonaws.com
```

## 参考资料

- [AWS Neuron SDK 文档](https://awsdocs-neuron.readthedocs-hosted.com/)
- [vLLM on Neuron 用户指南](https://awsdocs-neuron.readthedocs-hosted.com/en/latest/libraries/nxd-inference/vllm/index.html)
- [AWS Deep Learning Containers](https://aws.github.io/deep-learning-containers/)
- [vLLM 官方文档](https://docs.vllm.ai/)
